title: MaterializeMySQL fail on 'FLUSH'
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
```sql
CREATE DATABASE  IF NOT EXISTS  ops_grafana on cluster 'default_cluster'
ENGINE = MaterializeMySQL('10.20.0.241:3306', 'ops_grafana', 'root', 'xx')
SETTINGS allows_query_when_mysql_lost = 1, max_wait_time_when_mysql_unavailable = 10000, materialized_mysql_tables_list = 'annotation';
```
I get a full table data dump in clickhouse, but nor the increment data.
```
2025.09.19 17:00:22.611858 [ 794 ] {bf20d59d-f268-4a31-ba16-432d4caca49a} <Error> MaterializedMySQLSyncThread(ops_grafana): Query EXTERNAL DDL FROM MySQL(ops_grafana, ops_grafana) FLUSH TABLES wasn't finished successfully: Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 113 ('FLUSH'): FLUSH TABLES. Expected one of: token, OpeningRoundBracket, FILTER, RESPECT NULLS, IGNORE NULLS, OVER, create query, CREATE, DROP query, TRUNCATE, DROP, alter query, ALTER TABLE, RENAME query, RENAME DATABASE, RENAME TABLE, EXCHANGE TABLES, RENAME DICTIONARY, EXCHANGE DICTIONARIES, RENAME. ### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
```
Yes
### How to reproduce
create a database of MaterializeMySQL engine
### Expected behavior
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ops_grafana.annotations (id INT UNSIGNED, content VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ops_grafana.annotations (id, content) VALUES (1, 'First annotation');
INSERT INTO ops_grafana.annotations (id, content) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM ops_grafana.annotations WHERE content IS NULL;
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS ops_grafana_test;
key_bug_features: FLUSH TABLES command causes syntax error in MaterializeMySQL
